title: HIV Drug Resistance Prediction with ESM-2 Protein Language Model
description:
Analysis code for: Farquhar H. Protein Language Model Embeddings Improve HIV Drug Resistance Prediction: A Comprehensive Benchmark with Attention-Based Interpretability. Bioinformatics (2026), DOI: 10.1093/bioinformatics/btag260.

A machine learning pipeline for predicting HIV drug resistance from protein sequences using ESM-2 protein language model embeddings. The attention-weighted pooling approach achieves 0.968 mean AUC across 18 antiretroviral drugs, with 2.48x enrichment for known drug resistance mutations in high-attention positions.

v1.0.1 is a post-publication metadata update: the journal article DOI is now declared as a related identifier (isSupplementTo) and the CITATION.cff and README direct citation traffic to the article. No code changes.
